name: @ggui-samples/ggui-mapbox-demo
description: Reference sample: ggui server pre-configured with the @ggui-samples/gadget-mapbox gadget registered on `app.gadgets` AND `app.publicEnv` carrying the operator's Mapbox access token. Canonical end-to-end demonstration of the public env channel — wrapper `requires` declares `GGUI_PUBLIC_APP_MAPBOX_TOKEN`, the operator stamps the value, the push gate validates, and the iframe runtime forwards the union-filtered subset for `getPublicEnv` to read. Not published.
